---
title: "QCIPU 2026 — Computational Labs"
---

Hands-on Jupyter labs for the **QCIPU 2026** school (June 8–26, 2026).

**Labs are released daily.** Each lab appears in the sidebar on the day it is
taught — so check back each morning for the day's notebook. Labs from earlier in
the school stay available, and upcoming labs are added as the school progresses.

## How to use these labs

- Browse labs in the **sidebar** or the tables below.
- Click the **Open in Colab** badge on any row to run the lab in your browser —
  no installation needed. The first code cell installs the required packages.
- To keep your work in Colab, use **File → Save a copy in Drive**.

The code cells are the starting point; you'll fill in the parts marked
`???` (or `# your code here`) when you run the notebook.

## Week 1
_June 10–12 · Foundations — quantum mechanics & numerical methods_

| # | Date | Lab | Notebook |
|---|------|-----|----------|
| 1 | Thu, Jun 11 | Solving the Schrödinger Equation I | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-1/01_schrodinger_equation.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-1/01_schrodinger_equation.html) |
| 2 | Thu, Jun 11 | Solving the Schrödinger Equation II | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-1/02_schrodinger_equation_potentials.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-1/02_schrodinger_equation_potentials.html) |
| 3 | Fri, Jun 12 | Computational Complexity and Sorting | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-1/03_computational_complexity_and_sorting.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-1/03_computational_complexity_and_sorting.html) |
| 4 | Fri, Jun 12 | Calculating π with Monte Carlo | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-1/04_pi_with_monte_carlo.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-1/04_pi_with_monte_carlo.html) |
| 5 | Fri, Jun 12 | The Sign Problem | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-1/05_sign_problem.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-1/05_sign_problem.html) |

## Week 2
_June 15–18 · Qubits, gates, and the QFT_

| # | Date | Lab | Notebook |
|---|------|-----|----------|
| 6 | Mon, Jun 15 | 1-Qubit Gates and Noise | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-2/06_1qubit_gates_and_noise.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-2/06_1qubit_gates_and_noise.html) |
| 7 | Mon, Jun 15 | Schrödinger's Worm and Introducing 2-Qubit Gates | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-2/07_schrodingers_worm.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-2/07_schrodingers_worm.html) |
| 8 | Tue, Jun 16 | 2-Qubits: CNOT and Beyond | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-2/08_cnot_and_beyond.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-2/08_cnot_and_beyond.html) |
| 9 | Tue, Jun 16 | 2-Qubit Gate Decompositions | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-2/09_two_qubit_gate_decompositions.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-2/09_two_qubit_gate_decompositions.html) |
| 10 | Wed, Jun 17 | Quantum Adder ("So I heard you wanted to add numbers quantumly") | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-2/10_quantum_adder.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-2/10_quantum_adder.html) |
| 11 | Wed, Jun 17 | Quantum Teleportation | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-2/11_quantum_teleportation.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-2/11_quantum_teleportation.html) |
| 12–13 | Thu, Jun 18 | Quantum Fourier Transform (I & II) | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-2/12-13_quantum_fourier_transform.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-2/12-13_quantum_fourier_transform.html) |

## Week 3
_June 22–26 · Algorithms, error handling, and the final project_

| # | Date | Lab | Notebook |
|---|------|-----|----------|
| 14 | Mon, Jun 22 | Quantum Phase Estimation | _coming soon_ |
| 15–16 | Mon, Jun 22 | Grover's Algorithm (I & II) | _coming soon_ |
| 17 | Tue, Jun 23 | Grover's Algorithm and Sudoku | _coming soon_ |
| 18 | Tue, Jun 23 | Quantum Error Mitigation I | _coming soon_ |
| 19 | Wed, Jun 24 | Quantum Error Mitigation II | _coming soon_ |
| 20 | Wed, Jun 24 | Quantum Error Correction | _coming soon_ |
| 21 | Thu, Jun 25 | Fault-Tolerant Compilation ("Tolerate It") | _coming soon_ |
| 22 | Thu, Jun 25 | Final Project (Start) | _coming soon_ |
| 23 | Fri, Jun 26 | Final Project (Continued & Wrap-up) | _coming soon_ |

## Supplementary notebooks
_Alternate / earlier versions kept for reference; not part of the 2026 schedule._

| Notebook | |
|----------|--|
| 1-Qubit Gates: Visualizing with IBM Composer | [![Open in Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/hershsingh/qcipu-labs-2026-student/blob/main/week-x/1qubit_gates_visualizing.ipynb) · [view](https://hershsingh.github.io/qcipu-labs-2026-student/week-x/1qubit_gates_visualizing.html) |
